samples:
I took a boat across the ocean
And I sail away, sailing home
On an open sea that is so deep
I'm falling into my dreams



And yet we talk to all the time
About everything, but what does it change?
We talk about every step of the way
But we forget to look behind our backs
Behind us lies another world and other ways
This path is not for us to cross again


From a distance now you see how much you were wrong before
I was standing on this rock until you came
The land below your feet is sinking in the mud
While the sky above me is blue as ever
You think you have to fight with all the strength you've got left
It's too late now, you face your fate
And the blood flows out through you
Every step you take is just destroying you

Let the tide roll over me
Roll in these waves forever
All those moments lost on time
When nothing matters anymore



We talk about every step of the way
But we forget to look behind our backs
This path is not for us to cross again

We'll be running all day, won't stop to rest
And we will laugh at all the fools that try to hold us back
The fire in our eyes is growing stronger now
Let's see what we can do with this power in our hands


Come on let's go again! Let's roll for life!
We are rising from the ashes like a phoenix
Overcome by fear no matter how strong it is
Our faith in love and light shall always remain intact


No one but you will judge me, there's nothing to fear
I have come so far just to get here
From the darkest places inside I rise, you bow down
My heart is beating so loud I hear your words out of sight


Now stand up tall, push off the ground
Put one foot forward and run
The only way to move
This force within explodes


For better or for worse
Stand up tall, push off the ground
Get ready to fly high

All around me are the words
I'm getting tired of this game, I put down my arms
They told me not to get so uptight
But how could I ever learn? It's inborn


I am a child of fire and water
From the heart of earth, I was born
And all around me there is love and light
So it comes natural to be on time
The stars are watching over us
And they want us to make an effort
We have our own way to go
To prove ourselves to the world


There is no point left now in playing
And laughing at what you say
This fire burning deep inside
Is just too hot to handle now

Open your mind to understand yourself
Go back to where you belong
You will see, discover that your whole life long
You were dying for this moment
In the middle of a desert land
A river flows from underground


You don't remember why you came here
Or how to find your way back home
Now you are leaving behind all this trash
That doesn't even exist anymore

Get away from the pressure
That you've been trying to solve all along


You are on a ride that lasts for good
And it feels so right, now let it flow through you


Open your mind to the light of truth
Let us live with what we know
And never be fooled again


It hurts when you hear those words
"We know everything about this thing"
It's just not true

You have to face up and speak out
Your opinion is more than welcome here
We want to change the world, yes!

I open my heart, I feel the need in me
To dig deep inside my soul and find a way
Find myself inside out and get ready
For better times to come and go, no pain anymore

Let's see this situation eye-to-eye
From this moment on don't turn your back
We will reveal ourselves before time comes

Open your mind to the light of truth
Let us live with what we know
And never be fooled again

You are all around me, you're everywhere
And I can feel the power in your hands
I want to see what happens if we fight
What makes us so strong? What is this fire?


Now you don't have to prove anything to anyone else
Unless you want to make a difference
There's something that comes alive when you're standing up for yourself
This fire burning inside of you will never die again!


All these problems that come from being human beings
Are they too hard for us to face right now?
We put ourselves through tests and trials
But only time can tell our fate
So let's find a way out of here before it's too late
Find a solution while there's still hope for change

If people don't learn by experience how wrong they were
They could fall victim to their words
The answer lies within yourselves you cannot reach on higher ground
Until you grow up and mature until you finally rise above


Let's try and bring down whatever is wrong with the world today
Before it's too late

All I want to do is take a drink and be by myself
I'm so tired of this game that we all play
You can see right through me, I just don't care


If I could live my life again I would rather stay alone
Watching the world go round and round in circles on its own
I've had it too long now, I need space to breathe free


We sit in silence and count our blessings
And thank the Lord for this greatness
Feel no pressure anymore, let us rejoice
The world has forgiven us our guilt and pain
Now we feel the warmth of grace around us
Love surrounds us as we lie face down
Lay down with eyes closed, your words are on us
We come back where we belong

It's so easy to forget what you did in the past
Life goes round and round in circles and there's nothing left
But why should you change? We're alive for better or worse
This great illusion of progress is what made us wrong

We gather here now from all parts of the world
In time we will find the reasons for everything
Don't be afraid, open your mind and learn
By understanding each other, you can forgive yourselves
For every step that you took before, you know
Better than anyone else, I always have been
On your side, you won't regret not buying
Anything from them, 'cause they sell bullshit

I take my time and I choose to try
With what you call life, it's too late now
You have a choice and the means to go
Over the world, beyond this wall
And when we fall in love we all fly high
Soaring through space on wings of light
We leave ourselves behind and are so far away
Don't cry for us, there's no return now
It's like flying free from everything down here


All alone, floating through empty spaces
There's no place to be but out there
Nowhere else is open except where I'm at
Out in the great nothingness
When I come into being I find myself
Floating weightless through empty space
A new horizon has opened up before me
The infinite force flows down upon me


All alone, floating through empty spaces
There's no place to be but out there
Nowhere else is open except where I'm at
Out in the great nothingness

I don't want to die
So much pain I feel inside
This nightmare has no end
Is there a way out?

Are you ready for this one?
What is it like to be the king of all time?
You get up from your dream, and you realize
It happened to you


Now you see things as they are
A light is coming out, it's all around you now
But we do not understand
The force that is on us now

We all have to live until the end
Through fire and pain we will emerge again
Your soul is dying down, but soon you find
You're finally freed from suffering
And face the truth about yourself
And the reasons why you came back here


When we come in contact with ourselves
We fall into the open
All wrong turns made before
We learn our lessons now

We all have to live until the end
Through fire and pain we will emerge again
Your soul is dying down, but soon you find
You're finally freed from suffering

You left me alone, I just want to be
By myself now and always
I'm dying in silence now as they take my life away
They are so blind to see the truth of this world we live in
And it kills us all


We cannot change these rules that keep us alive
As long as we try to get stronger and overcome our fears
We have lost control over ourselves
The fire is burning inside but no one can tame it now
Unsuspected powers awake when you dig deep inside
There will come a day soon
When we face our fate and learn how to rule again
Overcoming fear is the key to freedom
No need to fight anymore, you don't belong there now
All these years wasted trying to figure out what makes you tick
You won't find the answer if you do not let go


Break through the gates and enter this place
Where you lay down on the grass and close your eyes
Feel the power beneath you and look straight up
You will meet an old friend by name: Sun

You're falling down
And all the stars are dying, fading away
Another star is born, a new dawn is coming


I feel this silence in my heart grow strong
Overwhelming me inside of me I recognize it
The silence is growing stronger as tears fall from my eyes
In me grows the strength to face life on my own

Ashes to ashes, dust to dust we turn
But before we die, let us remember our names
To give them honour and praise for what they gave to us
Let us celebrate their lives when they were alive

We are so sad we have to say goodbye
This fire that was burning bright has gone out forever
My only joy now left is to dig and dig until
Until at last we find a final resting place for all things lost

Ashes to ashes, dust to dust we turn
But before we die, let us remember our names
To give them honour and praise for what they gave to us
Let us celebrate their lives when they were alive
